Week 3 is live: Week 3 Pre-Draw Edition

Pre-draw edition for 20-26 April 2026 . Week 3 moves to a standalone Madrid ATP Masters 1000 slate, and the board is already tightening: Jannik Sinner arrives off the Monte-Carlo title and back at World No. 1, Carlos Alcaraz is already stacking wins in Barcelona, and the edge comes from balancing elite title equity against Week 2 workload before the Madrid bracket lands.

Bonus Ball board: Carlos Alcaraz, Jannik Sinner, Alexander Zverev.
